decisions.title: Prioritize Reactor Backend MVP vs Canvas Version Improvements
decisions.context: ENG-10179 (Reactor MVP) and ENG-9441 (Canvas improvements) both critical to 'Nail the Core' pillar. Reactor enables real-time decision capture (North Star metric), Canvas improves user workflow. Resource conflict between teams.

arguments.for: Reactor MVP directly drives North Star metric (Decisions Captured Per Customer) and differentiates from competitors. Canvas improvements are iterative enhancements.
arguments.against: Canvas V2 is customer-committed for Q2. Delaying risks customer trust and adoption. Canvas usage correlates with decision capture frequency.

decisions.title: Accelerate Client-Side Parsing (TDMS/HDF5) for Sift Edge
decisions.context: ENG-9980 (TDMS) and ENG-9968 (HDF5) parsing plus ENG-10268 (HDF5 client support) are foundational for Sift Edge product. 'Build the Moat' pillar requires Edge capabilities. Multiple parsing initiatives lack coordination.
decisions.blockedBy: Client-side architecture pattern not finalized. Performance benchmarks needed to validate approach vs server-side parsing.

arguments.for: Client-side parsing reduces server costs, enables offline workflows, and accelerates Edge adoption. Critical for embedded customer segment.
arguments.against: Introduces browser performance risks, file size limitations, and support complexity. Server-side parsing more reliable for large enterprise datasets.

decisions.title: Establish Rules Engine Performance Standards
decisions.context: ENG-10272 (bucketing for Rules evaluation) indicates performance optimization work. Python Rules is key 'Embed Deeper' product but lacks performance SLAs. Customer complaints about rule execution latency increasing.

arguments.for: Performance directly impacts decision velocity (North Star). Clear SLAs enable product differentiation and enterprise sales. Bucketing is tactical fix without strategic clarity.
arguments.against: Premature optimization. Customer adoption growing despite performance issues. Should focus on rule authoring experience first (Ask SIFT integration).

decisions.title: FedRAMP Timeline Risk Mitigation
decisions.context: ENG-10238 (merge main to fedramp 4/14), GTM-117 (FedRamp lander), plus multiple security issues (ENG-10258 TLS, ENG-10260 ALB headers, ENG-10261 deletion protection). FedRAMP certification blocks government customer segment.
decisions.blockedBy: 6 security issues outstanding. Merge scheduled for today but security posture incomplete.

arguments.for: FedRAMP unlocks $4M+ pipeline. Security issues are known and solvable. Marketing lander ready. Should proceed with phased rollout.
arguments.against: Rushing certification risks audit failure and brand damage. Security issues suggest deeper infrastructure gaps. Delay 2 weeks to resolve properly.

decisions.title: Explore V2 Feature Freeze Date
decisions.context: Multiple Explore V2 features in flight: ENG-9639 (legend/tooltip), ENG-10168 (Grafana sharelink), ENG-10208 (channel name settings), ENG-7858 (dynamic window switching). No clear release gate. 'Nail the Core' requires shipping.

arguments.for: Ship incrementally to gather user feedback. Features are additive and low-risk. Waiting for 'perfect' delays customer value.
arguments.against: Explore V2 positioning as 'complete reimagining' requires cohesive experience. Incremental shipping dilutes launch impact and marketing narrative.

timeAudit.weekSummary: Heavy meeting load (32hrs) limiting execution bandwidth. 3 critical decisions pending but only 8hrs focus time scheduled.
alerts: FedRAMP merge scheduled today but 4 unresolved security issues
Zero focus time scheduled Tuesday for strategic decisions
Engineering team fragmented across 12 active initiatives
No stakeholder alignment meeting for Reactor vs Canvas priority

events.title: FedRAMP Main Branch Merge
events.description: Merge main to fedramp branch. 6 security issues outstanding. High risk of delay.

events.title: Security Review Gate
events.description: Go/no-go for FedRAMP certification timeline. Decision on whether to proceed or delay 2 weeks.

events.title: Reactor Backend MVP Decision
events.description: Finalize prioritization: Reactor MVP vs Canvas improvements. Resource allocation decision.

events.title: Explore V2 Feature Freeze Review
events.description: Evaluate feature completeness. Decide on incremental vs cohesive release strategy.

events.title: Client-Side Parsing Architecture Review
events.description: Performance benchmarks for TDMS/HDF5 client-side parsing. Approve or pivot to server-side.

events.title: Rules Performance SLA Ratification
events.description: Establish performance standards for Python Rules. p95 execution time targets and monitoring.

events.title: SmallSat EU Booth Setup
events.description: Event booth backdrop and materials ready. GTM-113 dependency.

events.description: Complete ENG-9441. Versioning UX enhancements for Canvas. Customer-committed feature.

events.title: Sift Edge Metrics Dashboard Launch
events.description: ENG-10242: Observability for Sift Edge. Critical for pilot customer support and debugging.

events.description: External auditor assessment. Certification decision. Blocks government customer contracts.

events.description: Public launch of Explore V2. Major product release. 90% feature complete required.

events.title: Sift Edge Pilot Program Review
events.description: Evaluate pilot customer feedback. Decision on general availability timeline. Build the Moat KR.

events.title: Q2 Business Review
events.description: Strategy pillar performance review. North Star metric assessment. 2026 mid-year planning.
